data.title: Integrate skogix/scripts/ utility scripts
data.description:
**Context:** skogix/scripts/ contains utility scripts including queue service with retry logic and worktree helpers.

**Current scripts:**

* [create-worktree.sh](<http://create-worktree.sh>) - worktree creation helper
* hooks/ - git hooks or automation
* [process-prompt.sh](<http://process-prompt.sh>) - prompt processing
* queue/ - queue service implementation with retry logic

**Decision needed:**

* Where should utility scripts live in parent skogai (@scripts/ exists)?
* Which scripts are personal vs shared infrastructure?
* Integration strategy with parent @scripts/?
* Are these duplicates of parent functionality?

**Impact:** Queue service and worktree automation could benefit whole ecosystem.

**Related:** Part of skogix folder integration (#skogix-integration)
